title: OmniStereo: Real-Time Omnidireactional Depth Estimation with Multiview Fisheye Cameras
title_zh: OmniStereo：基于多视角鱼眼相机的实时全方位深度估计
abstract: Fast and reliable omnidirectional 3D sensing is essential to many applications such as autonomous driving, robotics and drone navigation. While many well-recognized methods have been developed to produce high-quality omnidirectional 3D information, they are too slow for real-time computation, limiting their feasibility in practical applications. Motivated by these shortcomings, we propose an efficient omnidirectional depth sensing framework, called OmniStereo, which generates high-quality 3D information in real-time. Unlike prior works, OmniStereo employs Cassini projection to simplify the photometric matching and introduces a lightweight stereo matching network to minimize computational overhead. Additionally, OmniStereo proposes a novel fusion method to handle depth discontinuities and invalid pixels complemented by a refinement module to reduce mapping-introduced errors and recover fine details. As a result, OmniStereo achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) accuracy, surpassing the second-best method over 32% in MAE, while maintaining real-time efficiency. It operates more than 16.5× faster than the second-best method in accuracy on TITAN RTX, achieving 12.3 FPS on embedded device Jetson AGX Orin, underscoring its suitability for real-world deployment. The code is available at https://github.com/DengJiaxi1/OmniStereo.
abstract_zh: 快速可靠的全方位3D感知对于自动驾驶、机器人和无人机导航等应用至关重要。尽管已有许多公认的方法能够生成高质量的全方位3D信息，但它们因计算速度过慢而无法实时运行，限制了实际可行性。受此启发，我们提出了一种高效的全方位深度感知框架OmniStereo，能够实时生成高质量3D信息。与先前工作不同，OmniStereo采用Cassini投影简化光度匹配，并引入轻量级立体匹配网络以最小化计算开销。此外，OmniStereo提出了一种新颖的融合方法来处理深度不连续和无效像素，并辅以细化模块减少映射引入的误差并恢复细节。最终，OmniStereo在保持实时效率的同时，达到了最先进的精度，MAE比第二名方法低32%以上。在TITAN RTX上，其运行速度比第二名方法快16.5倍以上，在嵌入式设备Jetson AGX Orin上达到12.3 FPS，凸显了其实际部署的适用性。代码已开源：https://github.com/DengJiaxi1/OmniStereo
tldr_zh: 提出实时全方位深度估计框架OmniStereo，精度和速度均超越现有方法。
cover_zh: 实时全方位深度估计｜比第二名快16倍还更准
